title: EmberNEO Client
description: A collection of mods to be used on a private server. Lightly modded with Vanilla+ and performance mods.
body:
(A modpack to be used on a private server.)

A lightly modded visually appealing Vanilla+ experience packed with QoL and performance mods for the best experience.

_Includes performance mods (Modernfix, Sodium, ex.), shader support via Iris Shaders (Complementary Reimagined+Unbound with Euphoria Patches included), various QoL mods (Appleskin, Journeymap, JEI, EMI, etc.), Vanilla+ tweaks and additions (Explosive Enhancement: Reforged, Dynamic Crosshair, Fresh Animations, Zoomify, etc), plus the Create mod. Does not include additional mods downloaded from the server via AutoModPack._
